data.title: Shang Shan
data.synopsis:
A Taoist priest, while tracking a demon, inadvertently discovered that a little girl in a certain family had been raised by the demon. She had consumed demon cores since childhood, altering her constitution, and the demon, due to a heavenly tribulation, could no longer care for her. The priest took the girl as his disciple, giving her the Taoist name Shang Shan, and the two began their journey through the human world, vanquishing demons and exorcising evil spirits.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Shang Shan aired on Fuji TV's B8station block. It adapts Jiang Jia Meizi's web manhua of the same title.

titles.title: Xian Jian Qi Xia Zhuan Si
Xian Jian Qi Xia Chuan Si

data.title: Xian Jian Qi Xia Zhuan Si
title_synonyms: Xian Jian Qi Xia Chuan Si
data.synopsis:
For the sake of their cultivation endeavors, the Qionghua Sect sent its elders to forge two swords, Wangshu and Xihe, and sought two disciples to wield them in dual cultivation, attempting to bind the demon realm and seize its immense spiritual power. This ultimately triggered a great war between humans and demons, resulting in heavy casualties on both sides. During this time, Su Yu, the host of Wangshu, disagreed with the Qionghua Sect's cultivation philosophy and left the sect with Yun Tianqing. The demon realm seized the opportunity to escape, and the Qionghua Sect's leader perished in the war. 

The two married on Qingluan Peak and had a son, Yun Tianhe. They both died young due to the icy cold that invaded their bodies. Young Yun Tianhe grew up alone on Qingluan Mountain. He was unaware of his parents' past, and the unexpected arrival of Han Lingsha set the wheels of fate turning once more.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: Wo Zai Feitu Shijie Sao Laji

data.title: Wo Zai Feitu Shijie Sao Laji
data.synopsis:
Zhu Ning, a warrior who slayed in all directions in a zombie apocalypse, unexpectedly dies and is transported to a wasteland filled with unknowns and fantasy. She becomes a fifth-class citizen, the lowest rank in the world, forced to make a living by "scavenging garbage." However, she discovers the strangeness and danger of this world in her work: various bizarre polluting monsters, the world's strange operating rules, and even her own strange self… Zhu Ning gradually uncovers a huge secret hidden behind the world, which also brings her immense danger. In this unknown post-apocalyptic world, Zhu Ning is forced into complex conflicts, searching for the truth about herself and the world.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of You Hua Zaiye's (有花在野) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Wangu Zhizun: Li Yunxiao Zhuan
data.synopsis:
Gu Feiyang, the third strongest warrior on the Tianwu Continent and the Martial Emperor Pojun, was bound by the world's rules, his cultivation stuck at the Nine Heavens Martial Emperor realm for many years, unable to break through. To escape this predicament, he used the affections of Qu Hongyan, the mistress of the Shenxiao Palace, to orchestrate a grand scheme, sacrificing extraterrestrial demonic energy to reincarnate and cultivate anew. 

In his reincarnation, he was named Li Yunxiao, a 15-year-old boy from the Tianshui Kingdom and the eldest grandson of the Li family of the Marshal's Mansion. At this time, Tianshui was beset by powerful enemies invading from the outside and princes vying for the throne from within, making the Li family, who held military power, the center of a vortex of crisis. Faced with the power struggles of everyone, Li Yunxiao stood at a higher level, calmly breaking through the impasse. He deeply understood that in this world where martial arts reign supreme, all power ultimately came from within, and his goal remained singular: to complete the scheme laid out in his previous life and build a foundation for the Divine Realm.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Tai Yisheng Shui's (太一生水) web novel of the same title.

data.title: You Shou Yan 5th Season
data.synopsis: Fifth season of You Shou Yan.

data.title: Bai Ri Cheng Wang
data.synopsis:
One second the restaurant was filled with joy, the next it was a river of blood… The king, who clearly loved his people, suddenly became a bloodthirsty beast… "Ming" has lost everyone he cared about; this terrible king is truly awful! I will take my revenge! Wait, you mean the soul in front of me with only 100 days left to live is the real "Lie"? Alright, alright! 100 days—let's both be crowned kings together!

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: 镇魂街 王国纷争篇
Zhen Hun Jie Wangguo Fenzheng Pian

data.title: Zhen Hun Jie 5th Season
title_synonyms: 镇魂街 王国纷争篇
Zhen Hun Jie Wangguo Fenzheng Pian
data.synopsis:
The world of Rakshasa Street is engulfed in conflict, with various forces stirring with ambition. The united forces of Cao, Sun, and Liu, are unstoppable, the Hall of Heroes suffers a devastating blow, and the Spirit Realm's rule is on the verge of collapse. Countless heroes are emerging, and a new crisis is about to erupt due to the ambitions of the Kingdom Organization. In the world of Rakshasa Street, no one dares to say "no!" Cao Yanbing's path to becoming king has officially begun!

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

data.title: Inaka Hoshi
data.synopsis:
In the year 20XX, space development had progressed beyond the present day, and humanity had expanded its living spaces across many planets. On the far edge of the galaxy lies the Countryside Planet, home to Moyori Obayashi, a first-year high school student who enjoys collecting scraps and discarded things, and her friend Kayo Daijamori, a girl who dreams of magic and loves to imagine other worlds. This is the story of a mysterious summer day they share. Set in a society increasingly focused on standardizing and controlling people, the story asks how the overlooked, undefined spaces—those pushed out of view—may hold something essential for preserving our humanity and the freedom to be ourselves.

(Source: Indie-AniFest)

titles.title: Mata Korosarete Shimatta no desu ne, Tantei-sama
また殺されてしまったのですね、探偵様

data.title: Mata Korosarete Shimatta no desu ne, Tantei-sama
data.title_japanese: また殺されてしまったのですね、探偵様
data.synopsis:
Sakuya Otsuki is the son of a legendary detective, working to follow in his father's footsteps with his assistant, Lilithea. However, something's different about this high-school sleuth. Wherever he goes, he always manages to get himself entangled in his cases—as a murder victim! When Sakuya is tasked to infiltrate a luxury cruise ship, he finds himself killed once again. But every time he reopens his eyes, Lilithea is there by his side, ready to help him get to the bottom of the mystery...

(Source: Yen Press)

data.title: Daikaijuu Gaea-tima
data.synopsis:
A gigantic monster devastates a small, seaside town. Ten years later, the resilient community has emerged as a tourist destination, when the monster, known as Gaea-tima, returns. Miyako, a local hero and survivor of the first attack, pushes to find a scientific solution to the problem of the giant creatures known as "gigantis." But is humanity capable of responding to violence with anything except more violence?

(Source: Kodansha USA)

data.title: Wareware wa Uchuujin
data.synopsis:
One summer in the third grade, a quiet boy named Tsubasa meets Kyotaro, a boy everyone in the class looked up to, and the two become close friends. Within their small world, they share irreplaceable moments—until a small incident suddenly tears them apart. Spanning more than thirty years, this gentle, contemplative story invites the audience to reflect on the meaning of life through the paths their lives take.

(Source: Nothing New)

titles.title: Majutsu wo Kiwamete Tabi ni Deta Tensei Elf, Moteamashita Jumyou de Ikeru Densetsu to Naru
Tensei Elf ni Yoru 900-nen no Yuukyuu Musouki
魔術を極めて旅に出た転生エルフ、持て余した寿命で生ける伝説となる

data.title: Majutsu wo Kiwamete Tabi ni Deta Tensei Elf, Moteamashita Jumyou de Ikeru Densetsu to Naru
data.title_japanese: 魔術を極めて旅に出た転生エルフ、持て余した寿命で生ける伝説となる
title_synonyms: Tensei Elf ni Yoru 900-nen no Yuukyuu Musouki
data.synopsis:
Minoru Kido, age 30, cause of death: traffic accident. As a Japanese, I died without leaving any evidence of my life. At the time of my death, I was thinking, "Next time, I want to live a long life and leave behind some proof of my life," when I was reincarnated as an elf with a life span of 1,000 years! That's why I made a vow. I vowed that this time I would spend my whole life living in a way that would leave a mark on my life.

At the age of 20, I was able to use all of the healing magic that elves were originally equipped with at will. By the age of 30, I had mastered all attribute magic, and by the age of 100, I had deciphered all the ancient magic formulas. For the remaining 900 years of my life, all I have to do is run out of the Elven forest and become a warrior.

One day, I'll be missed by a fledgling adventurer who will eventually be called a hero. Sometimes, a country is founded in my name. Sometimes, I was called the founder of magic and became an object of worship. This is the story of a reincarnated elf who roars his name into history as a living legend.

(Source: Kakuyomu, translated)

data.title: Meme (2025)
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Meme by Keina Suda.

data.title: Kami no Shizuku
data.synopsis:
Shizuku Kanzaki is the only son of world-renowned wine critic Yutaka Kanzaki. From a young age, Shizuku has been subjected to strange education from his father all for the sake of wine. From learning to gracefully decant a drink to intently remembering the smell of leather belts and pencils, the training causes him to grow resentful of everything related to wine. Discontent with his father, he leaves home to become an average sales representative for a beer company, refusing to ever touch wine again.

When his father suddenly passes away, Shizuku finds himself being dragged back into the world he hates so much. As part of his father's will, the one who will inherit his prized wine collection and estate will be the person who can correctly identify the "12 Apostles" of wines as well as the legendary "Drops of God." In order to inherit the assets, Shizuku has one year to complete the task, but he finds the proposition ridiculous when he is the only living relative of Yutaka.

What Yutaka failed to tell his son before his death was that he had adopted Issei Tomine into the family a week prior to his passing. Issei is a famous veteran wine critic competing against Shizuku to claim the estate for himself. With no formal training in wine tasting, Shizuku stands no chance against "The Prince of Wine" and is at risk of losing everything in this competition. Will he be able to correctly identify the elusive "Drops of God" before he runs out of time?

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
